**For security vulnerabilities, do NOT open an issue.**

Email **security@smgglrs.ai** instead. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

---

Use this template only for non-sensitive security questions
(e.g., "How do I configure Cedar policies?" or "What safety
profile should I use for production?").
